name: lorewire-video
description: Remotion project for LoreWire doodle shorts. Also hosts the Cloud Run render service (Phase 1 of _plans/2026-06-14-cloud-run-render.md).

scripts.//deploy comment: Reads the same env vars Vercel uses (CRON_SECRET + GCS_BUCKET + GCS_CLIENT_EMAIL + GCS_PRIVATE_KEY). The .env.local stores GCS_PRIVATE_KEY with literal \n escapes (same as lib/gcs.ts normalizes); that form passes through gcloud --set-env-vars without splitting on commas because a PEM has none.
scripts.deploy:cloud-run: gcloud run deploy lorewire-render --source . --region ${CLOUD_RUN_REGION:-us-central1} --memory 4Gi --cpu 2 --timeout 3600 --no-allow-unauthenticated --update-env-vars CRON_SECRET=$CRON_SECRET --update-env-vars GCS_BUCKET=$GCS_BUCKET --update-env-vars GCS_CLIENT_EMAIL=$GCS_CLIENT_EMAIL --update-env-vars GCS_PRIVATE_KEY="$GCS_PRIVATE_KEY"
